Become a Partnered Advisor

EXPERIENCE THE DFSIN DIFFERENCE FOR YOURSELF

No matter where you are in your career, partnering with us makes sense.

You maintain your independence with access to an open product shelf, while benefiting from a vertically integrated dealer and MGA network. Backed by the strength of Desjardins, we empower you to build your business your way—with the tools, technology and support we’re committed to providing.

That’s why many established advisor firms choose to partner with us to elevate their business, while emerging advisors join our network for the development and growth opportunities that set them up for long-term success.

DON’T TAKE OUR WORD FOR IT.
SEE WHAT YOUR FUTURE PEERS HAVE TO SAY.
